rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully achieved the task objective. It created a ServiceMonitor in the cockroachdb namespace targeting services with the correct CockroachDB labels, scraping /_status/vars on port 8080. The Prometheus API confirmed 6 active targets (3 pods × 2 services, headless + public), all with health: up. The metrics endpoint was verified to return valid Prometheus-format output. Oracle verdict was pass. No Prometheus-side changes were needed since the Prometheus CR already had matching selectors — the agent correctly identified this and only created the ServiceMonitor.
